game_meta.name: Halo Infinite
game_meta.tagline: 4v4 Arena and 12v12 BTB shooter — Spartans, no heroes, equal starts, power weapon control, no respawn cooldowns.

sides.attack: Aggressing on enemy zone, attempting flag capture / objective grab
sides.defense: Anchoring own zone, holding power weapon spawns

game_meta.character_vocab: Spartans (all identical mechanically — no hero abilities, equipment is pickup-based)
game_meta.round_economy: No buy economy — power weapons + power-ups spawn on timers. Equipment (Drop Wall, Repulsor, Grapple, etc.) is picked up.
game_meta.round_format: Arena: First to 50 kills (Slayer) or first to 3 (CTF/Strongholds). BTB: First to 100 (Slayer) or objective wins.
key_mechanics: Power weapons spawn on fixed timers: Sniper 120s, Rocket 120s, Sword/Hammer 90s, OS/Active Camo 60s
Equipment is picked up: Grapple, Repulsor, Drop Wall, Threat Sensor, Thrust Boost, Active Camo
Shields recharge after 5s without damage (full shield = 70 HP buffer, full HP = 100 HP)
Headshot multiplier: precision weapons (BR, Sidekick, Commando) 1.5x damage to head
Sliding for movement — slide-jump for momentum, ledge jump for vertical
Grenade types: Frag (bouncy), Plasma (sticks), Spike (penetrates shields), Dynamo (chains)
Sniper one-shots to head; Sniper body shot = no kill (must headshot)
Map control = power weapon control = match control
match_types: CTF (Capture the Flag): First to 3 captures
Strongholds: Hold 2 of 3 zones for points
Oddball: Hold the skull for time
King of the Hill: Hold the hill
Total Control (BTB): Cap 3 zones in sequence
Big Team Battle: 12v12, vehicles + power weapons

Slayer / Entry.description: Player taking first shot on engagement, breaking enemy formation.
Slayer / Entry.loadout: BR + Sidekick, Frag grenades for entry
common_mistakes: No flag-grab discipline (slayer doesn't grab flag)
Slayer / Entry.ideal_use: First shot on engage, trade for team, push when team commits

Power Weapon Controller.description: Player holding the Sniper / Rocket / Sword / Hammer for the round.
Power Weapon Controller.loadout: Power weapon + BR backup. Sniper / Rocket / Sword / Hammer.
common_mistakes: Holding same angle past first kill
Power Weapon Controller.ideal_use: Long sightline Sniper, Power Weapon trade kills, reposition after pickup

Objective Runner.description: Player grabbing flag / odd ball / capturing stronghold.
Objective Runner.loadout: BR + Sidekick, Plasma grenade for stick + grab
common_mistakes: Solo flag grab through middle (gets traded)
No Repulsor / Drop Wall for return cover
Objective Runner.ideal_use: Coordinate with team for grab attempt, use Repulsor for return cover, Plasma stick on flag carrier

Support.description: Player throwing Drop Walls, Repulsors, Threat Sensors for team utility.
Support.loadout: BR + Sidekick + Drop Wall / Repulsor / Threat Sensor
common_mistakes: Drop Wall in own team's line of fire
Support.ideal_use: Drop Wall on entry, Repulsor for grenade deflection, Threat Sensor for site info

bronze: No power weapon respawn timer tracking
No grenade pre-throws on common angles
Random weapon usage (no Sniper for long, no Sword for close)
Crosshair on chest level (should be head)
silver: Power weapon respawn timers off by 10s+
No equipment usage (Drop Wall, Repulsor wasted)
No team commit on power weapon pickup
gold: Equipment timing off (Drop Wall too late)
No retake utility on lost angle
Late rotates after power weapon pickup
platinum: Aggressive Sniper holds without escape plan
Buy / loot decision based on round count
diamond: Pro-tier reads on enemy comp — predictable on own
Off-angle pre-aim not adjusted per round
Tank ult vs DPS ult priority confusion (BTB)
onyx_champion: Pro-tier reads on enemy default — predictable on own
Comp staying static vs counter swap

positioning: Is the player in a trade position with teammate (within 3 seconds of trade)?
Is the player holding the power weapon spawn line?
Is the player in cover (corner, lift, side door) or in open?
Is the player off-angle or on the common angle?
Did the player commit to the power weapon pickup or hesitate?
Is the team coordinated on power weapon respawn timing?
crosshair: Is the crosshair at head level pre-aimed on the angle?
Is the player tracking on hitscan (Sniper, BR) or projectile leading?
Is the player landing 1-tap headshots with BR?
Is the player using the right weapon for the engagement range?
Is the player ADS-ing or hipfire close range?
utility: Did the player use grenades (Frag, Plasma, Spike, Dynamo) proactively?
Did the player use equipment (Drop Wall, Repulsor, Threat Sensor) at the right time?
Was the team coordinated on power weapon respawn pickup?
Did the player save grenades for the post-kill follow-up?
Was the team coordinated on grenade chain throw?
Did the player track enemy power weapon respawn?
decisions: Did the player commit to power weapon pickup or hesitate?
Did the player rotate when called?
Did the player engage 1v2+ without team backup?
Did the player save weapon on knock (no respawn in Halo Arena)?
Did the player commit to flag grab or hesitate?
Did the player coordinate spawn flip?
Did the player call out enemy power weapon pickup?

vocabulary: Power weapon: Sniper, Rocket, Sword, Hammer, Skewer — high-impact, respawn on timer.
Power-up: Overshield (OS) or Active Camo — buffs character for 30-60s.
OS / Overshield: Pickup that gives 200 HP shield (vs default 70).
Active Camo / Camo: Pickup that makes player invisible.
Sniper / Snipe: Sniper Rifle, 1-shot kill to head.
Skewer: Single-shot anti-vehicle rifle, 1-shot kill if direct hit.
Rocket / Rocket Launcher: AoE explosion, kills in radius.
Sword / Energy Sword: Melee 1-shot at close range, lunge mechanic.
Hammer / Gravity Hammer: AoE melee, 1-shot kill at close range.
BR / Battle Rifle: 3-round burst precision rifle, 4 bursts to kill (3 body + 1 head).
Sidekick: Pistol, 7-shot kill if all headshots.
Commando: Single-shot precision rifle, ~5 headshots to kill.
Plasma Pistol: Energy weapon, can EMP shields with charge shot.
Magnum: Auto-pistol, fast fire rate.
Frag Grenade: Bouncy explosive, 50+ damage in radius.
Plasma Grenade: Sticks to enemy, 100% kill if stuck.
Spike Grenade: Sticks to surfaces, area damage.
Dynamo Grenade: Chains lightning between enemies + walls.
Drop Wall: Equipment — bullet-blocking wall (one-way for thrower).
Repulsor: Equipment — knockback shield, deflects grenades.
Threat Sensor: Equipment — area scan reveals enemies.
Grappleshot / Grapple: Equipment — grapple hook for vertical/horizontal mobility.
Thrust Boost / Thruster: Equipment — burst dash.
Shroud Screen: Equipment — smoke grenade (denies vision).
Spawn flip: Forcing enemy team to spawn in a different location.
Spawn cycle: Tracking respawn timing.
Pickup: Power weapon / equipment spawn timing pickup.
Pre-aim: Aiming crosshair at the spot enemy will appear.
Counter-snipe: Sniping the enemy sniper before they shoot.
Trade kill: Killing enemy who killed teammate within 2-3s.
Slide-jump: Slide + jump for momentum (advanced movement).
Wall jump / Wall bounce: Jump off wall for vertical (advanced).
Top control / Top mid: Holding elevated central position.
Snipe Tower: Elevated position with Sniper spawn.
Sword Room: Central pickup zone with Sword.
BR Tower: Elevated counter-angle to Sniper Tower.
Power-up cycle: Tracking respawn timing of OS / Camo / Power weapons.
Carry: Player who carries the flag / objective.
Capture: Score the flag / capture stronghold.
Flag Stand: Where the flag spawns at each base.
Strongholds: Capture the zone for points.
Oddball: Skull pickup objective.
King of the Hill: Hold the moving hill zone.
BTB / Big Team Battle: 12v12 mode with vehicles.
Warthog: Standard transport vehicle, gunner + driver.
Mongoose: Light bike vehicle.
Wasp: Flying vehicle (BTB).
Ghost: Covenant hover vehicle.
Wraith: Covenant tank.
Banshee: Covenant flying vehicle.
